allowed: Textbook, personal notes, lab documentation, Kali VM
tips: Review Labs 1.1–1.3 and your reconnaissance methodology
Know the CIA triad and how it applies to security decisions
Understand threat actor types and their motivations
timeManagement: Budget ~90 seconds per question. Timer starts on click and cannot be paused.
readyMessage: Make sure you have a stable connection and 45 uninterrupted minutes.
